latHint: Think unclear thinking - not wet ground.
pivHint: Wetlands are MUDDY underfoot - but 'MUDDY thinking' describes what kind of mind?
winText: Unclear and confused. MUDDY was the pivot - wetland mud to FOGGY thinking.
lossText: FOGGY - unclear, confused. MUDDY was the pivot: wetland mud to MUDDY, FOGGY thinking.
